beforeEn: No such functionality existed. Many terms were not understood, especially by new employees
before: 无此功能，很多名词的意思大家不理解，尤其是对于新入职员工
after: 对话式秒出结果，知识管理和传承
excerptEn: Instant conversational terminology lookup for knowledge management
description: 利用Dify建立知识库快速开发完成。解决新入职员工不理解专业名词含义的痛点，通过对话式交互秒出结果，实现知识管理和传承。
excerpt: 对话式秒出名词解释，知识管理与传承
afterEn: Conversational instant results for knowledge management and transfer
name: QUA名词助手
descriptionEn: Rapidly developed using Dify knowledge base. Addresses the pain point of new employees not understanding professional terminology. Conversational interaction delivers instant results for knowledge management and transfer.

beforeEn: BIMS system had no conversational query functionality
before: BIMS系统的信息无对话式查询功能
after: 对话式查询信息，支持智能总结和建议，随时问随时答
excerptEn: Conversational quality info query with smart summaries and suggestions
description: BIMS系统的信息无对话式查询功能，计划换AI工具开发。实现对话式查询信息，支持智能总结和建议，随时问随时答，体验完全升级。
excerpt: 对话式查询质量信息，支持智能总结和建议
afterEn: Conversational info query with smart summaries and suggestions. Ask anytime, answer instantly
name: BIMS质量问题查询助手
descriptionEn: BIMS system lacked conversational query functionality. Planning to redevelop with AI tools. Enables conversational info query with smart summaries and suggestions. Ask anytime, answer instantly. Complete UX upgrade.

beforeEn: Ops needed to log into N systems daily to check logs, monitoring, and info
before: 运维每天需要登入N个系统来查看日志、监控、信息等
after: 实现统一页面查看，后续Agent自动巡检给出建议报告+自动操作，效率提升，快速定位
excerptEn: Unified dashboard for multi-platform logs and monitoring with agent auto-patrol
description: 利用Hermes调取各个平台API，实现统一页面查看多平台日志、监控和信息。后续计划进行Agent自动巡检给出建议报告并自动操作，效率大幅提升，快速定位问题。
excerpt: 统一页面查看多平台日志与监控，Agent自动巡检
afterEn: Unified dashboard view. Future agent auto-patrol with recommendations and auto-ops for efficiency and fast localization
name: 运维统一监控平台
descriptionEn: Leveraging Hermes to call various platform APIs. Achieves unified dashboard for multi-platform logs and monitoring. Future plan: Agent auto-patrol with recommendation reports and auto-operations for significant efficiency improvement and fast issue localization.

beforeEn: Ops needed to SSH into servers to manually check logs. Low efficiency. Could not auto-detect anomalies
before: 运维需要登录服务器手工查日志，效率低，无法自动发现异常
after: 每天自动生成日志分析报告，错误率超标自动邮件通知，识别隐蔽攻击，被动救火变成主动监控
excerptEn: Daily auto-generated analysis reports with anomaly email alerts
description: 已搭建nginx日志自动采集，分析脚本可定时运行，正在优化告警阈值。实现每天自动生成日志分析报告，错误率超标自动邮件通知，运维无需手工干预。从被动救火变成主动监控，可识别隐蔽攻击。
excerpt: 每日自动生成分析报告，异常自动邮件通知
afterEn: Daily auto analysis reports. Auto email alerts on error threshold breach. Hidden attack detection. From reactive to proactive
name: nginx访问日志分析
descriptionEn: Nginx log auto-collection built, analysis scripts run on schedule, optimizing alert thresholds. Daily auto-generated analysis reports with automatic email notifications when error rates exceed thresholds. Ops no longer needs manual intervention. Shifted from reactive firefighting to proactive monitoring with hidden attack detection.

beforeEn: Quality inspection data scattered across stages. Root cause tracing heavily manual. Lacked dynamic monitoring and deep correlation analysis of key factors
before: 机加工质量检测数据分散于各加工环节，根因追溯高度依赖人工，缺乏关键关联因子的动态监测与深度关联分析
after: 构建感知—分析—决策—优化一体化的质量智能管控闭环
excerptEn: AI auto-attribution, failure mode recognition, quality risk quantification
description: 收到来自机加质量的AI需求。当前机加工质量检测数据分散于各加工环节，质量问题根因追溯高度依赖人工。亟需引入AI实现质量问题的自动归因、失效模式智能识别、质量风险量化评估，构建'感知—分析—决策—优化'一体化的质量智能管控闭环。
excerpt: AI自动归因、失效模式识别、质量风险量化评估
afterEn: Build integrated quality intelligent control closed loop: perception → analysis → decision → optimization
name: 机加质量AI
descriptionEn: Received AI requirements from machining quality team. Quality inspection data scattered across machining stages with root cause tracing heavily dependent on manual work. Urgently needs AI for auto-attribution, intelligent failure mode recognition, and quality risk quantification to build an integrated quality intelligent control closed loop.

beforeEn: After ETL scheduling failures, manual re-execution and troubleshooting was required
before: ETL调度任务出问题后，手工去重新执行，排错
after: 实现智能化判断，减少手工，提高效率，自动排错
excerptEn: ETL scheduling auto-management with intelligent diagnosis and auto-recovery
description: 调度任务自动管理分析平台。当ETL调度任务出问题时，不再需要手工去重新执行和排错，实现智能化判断，减少手工操作，提高效率，自动排错。
excerpt: ETL调度任务自动管理，智能判断与自动排错
afterEn: Intelligent diagnosis, reduced manual work, improved efficiency with auto-recovery
name: 智能调度平台
descriptionEn: Automated scheduling task management and analysis platform. When ETL scheduling tasks fail, no longer needs manual re-execution and troubleshooting. Achieves intelligent diagnosis, reduces manual operations, improves efficiency with auto-recovery.
